title: Pindara Group of Temples
tagline: Pindara Group of Temples — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: The temples at Pindara, locally known as Durvasa Rishi Ashram, in Kalyanpur Taluka of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India belongs to Maitraka-Saindhava period (7th to 10th ce
overview.description: The temples at Pindara, locally known as Durvasa Rishi Ashram, in Kalyanpur Taluka of Devbhoomi Dwarka district, Gujarat, India belongs to Maitraka-Saindhava period (7th to 10th century). The temples are located near sea, about eleven miles east of Dwarka.

topPlaces.name: Pindara, Gujarat
topPlaces.description: Pindara, also known as Pindaraka or Pindataraka is a village near Dwarka, on the shoreline of Gulf of Kutch, in Devbhoomi Dwarka district of Gujarat, India.

items.note: Pindara, also known as Pindaraka or Pindataraka is a village near Dwarka, on the shoreline of Gulf of Kutch, in Devbhoomi Dwarka district of Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Pindara Group of Temples?
faq.a: The best time to visit Pindara Group of Temples is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Pindara Group of Temples?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Porbandar Airport (80 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (157 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Pindara Group of Temples?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Pindara Group of Temples at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Pindara Group of Temples?
faq.a: Stays in Pindara Group of Temples start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Pindara Group of Temples?
faq.a: The top attractions are Pindara, Gujarat.
